outcome_contract.why: Fresh deployments and CI builds fail silently (500 on every page) when the content generation step is skipped. The materializer warning also means even manual re-runs are unsafe without the trustStrip fix.
outcome_contract.intended_outcome_statement: The Caryina app builds and serves content on fresh checkout without a separate manual generation step; all pages fall back to hardcoded safe content rather than throwing a 500 when the file is absent or malformed.

engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: Content is copy/text; no rendering change

engineering_coverage.applicable: Fallback returns safe defaults on missing/malformed file; shop renders degraded but functional
engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: `console.warn` makes degraded state visible in logs

engineering_coverage.applicable: N/A — file is static JSON, no auth

engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: CI logs capture prebuild materializer run output

engineering_coverage.applicable: Unit tests for missing-file and malformed-JSON fallback paths
Materializer schema extended with `trustStrip`; stale copy removed; single canonical path
Single point of failure eliminated; prebuild ensures fresh content before build
engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: Fallback is hot-path safe (returns constant, no I/O after first success)

engineering_coverage.applicable: Committed JSON is rollback baseline; materializer change is additive
engineering_coverage.gap_or_implication: No migration needed; revert JSON commit to roll back

stage_payload.summary: The Caryina shop crashes (500) on every page when `data/shops/caryina/site-content.generated.json` is absent. This plan fixes that in three layers: (1) port `productPage.trustStrip` into the materializer so regeneration can run safely; (2) add a `prebuild` script that auto-generates the file before `next build`; and (3) add a runtime fallback in `readPayload()` so the app serves safe hardcoded copy rather than throwing when the file is missing or malformed. A stale second tracked copy of the file is also removed, and unit tests are added for the new fallback paths.
goals: App never crashes with 500 when content file is absent or malformed
Fresh checkout builds and serves content without a manual generation step
Single authoritative copy of the generated content file
constraints: `trustStrip` must not be dropped; it is customer-visible on every PDP
`prebuild` in `apps/caryina/package.json` runs with `cwd = apps/caryina/` — materializer must be invoked with `--repo-root ../..`
CI `caryina.yml` build command is unchanged (no workflow file PR needed — prebuild runs automatically as part of `next build`)
assumptions: `## Reusable Trust Blocks` section in `HBAG/content-packet.md` provides the 3 trust bullet texts (confirmed)
Committed `data/shops/caryina/site-content.generated.json` at repo root is the authoritative copy
`cachedPayload` module-level cache in `contentPacket.ts` requires `jest.resetModules()` between tests testing the missing/malformed paths
selected_approach: Port `productPage.trustStrip` to `materializeSiteContentPayload()` using a new `extractH2BulletList()` function
Replace hard throws in `readPayload()` with `console.warn` + return of `SAFE_DEFAULTS`
Why planning is not reopening option selection:
Analysis settled the trustStrip porting decision, the prebuild cwd constraint, and the h2-extractor requirement with direct code evidence

task_briefs.title: Add unit tests for fallback paths

areas.label: Content generation
areas.flow: (1) `prebuild` runs materializer `--business HBAG --shop caryina --repo-root ../..`; (2) materializer reads `HBAG/content-packet.md`; (3) writes `data/shops/caryina/site-content.generated.json`; (4) `next build` consumes freshly-written file
areas.seams: If content-packet is missing (corrupt checkout), materializer fails `ok:false` → prebuild exits non-zero → build fails with diagnostic (correct failure mode)

areas.label: Runtime resilience
areas.trigger: SSR page render when file absent or malformed
areas.flow: `readPayload()` logs warning, returns `SAFE_DEFAULTS`; all `get*Content()` exports return safe brand copy; pages render without crashing
areas.seams: Fallback copy must be real brand copy (not generator placeholders) — TASK-02 responsibility

areas.label: Stale copy removal
areas.flow: `apps/caryina/data/shops/caryina/site-content.generated.json` removed from git; candidate resolution unchanged (repo-root copy is still candidate 1)

areas.label: Test coverage
areas.flow: New describe block in `contentPacket.test.ts`: missing-file case returns `SAFE_DEFAULTS`; malformed-JSON case returns `SAFE_DEFAULTS`; existing chrome tests unaffected
areas.seams: Must use `jest.resetModules()` to clear module cache between tests
